targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM silver.transactions WHERE order_date = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT ROUND(SUM(total_amount),2) AS value FROM silver.transactions WHERE order_date = CURRENT_DATE AND status = 'delivered'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM silver.sessions WHERE start_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
SELECT ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN converted THEN 100.0 ELSE 0 END),2) AS value FROM silver.sessions WHERE session_date = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT order_date AS time, SUM(total_amount) AS revenue FROM silver.transactions WHERE order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 7 GROUP BY order_date ORDER BY order_date
SELECT primary_category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM silver.transactions WHERE order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 7 GROUP BY primary_category ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8
